codeReview.summary: The fix closes the previously reported loss-of-side-effect path by requiring note commands to execute through ExecuteWithQuerier inside the same db.RunTx that persists hook_events, while the earlier stable delivery-based idempotency key logic in commands.go already covers rerun/focus replay dedupe. Existing regression tests now exercise replay dedupe and retry-after-failure atomicity through the production webhook handler.

summary: Reviewed the fix handoff/transcript, the prior failed review, and both commits (29ae864468dfe743886317306885fd4242d72954 and 8f7e52f2690d2a02406de9c40106ccbfd8409787). The original failure's two blocking gaps are now jointly addressed: stable delivery-derived idempotency for rerun/focus is present in commands.go, and handler.go now removes the non-transactional fallback so replay after a partial failure cannot lose command effects. I found no remaining blocking issues in scope.
